text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Training hasn't started yet, but Vodka doesn't
look so good...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
N-no! We can't do that! Like I'd ever do somethin'
so lame!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: No pain, no gain! That's what cool is!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Time to get straight into training! I can push
through this, easy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka struggles to endure her splitting
headaches throughout our training session.
